last_assistant_message:
## Status: PASS

### Changes
- `TranscriptIngestController.cs`: replaced UTF-16-char-index slice with `TruncateUtf8` — rune-aware walk that consumes `Utf8SequenceLength` per rune until the byte budget (`MaxTextBytes - TruncationMarkerBytes`) is hit, then appends `…[truncated]`. Final result is guaranteed `<= MaxTextBytes` (8192) and rune-boundary clean.
- `TranscriptIngestControllerTests.cs`: added 5th fact `Post_truncates_at_rune_boundary_for_multibyte_text` — feeds 3000x `U+1F600` (12 KiB UTF-8), asserts `<= 8 KiB`, ends with `[truncated]`, and re-encode/decode round-trip is identity (proves no broken surrogates).

### Test output
- Controller suite: 5/5 passed (Duration 64 ms).
- Regression (Scrubber + IdempotencyCache + IngestService): 11/11 passed (Duration 52 ms).
- Build clean (only pre-existing NU1507 / NU1903 / CS0618 warnings).

### Commit
- SHA: `172947f7`
- Branch: `feat/transcript-ingest` (HEAD `172947f7`, prior `88d9c677`)
- Message: `fix(api): TranscriptIngestController truncates on UTF-8 byte boundary`
- 2 files changed, 50 insertions(+), 1 deletion(-) — DI untouched as instructed.
